# Summary

**Python** >=3.11

[Project documentation](https://kaiju-auth.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)

User authentication, permissions, groups, sessions.

Use `pip install kaiju-auth` to install the package.

For development run the init script `tools/init.sh`.
It will setup git hooks and install the dev version of the project.

See [developer guide](https://kaiju-auth.readthedocs.io/en/latest/#developer-guide) for details.

classes.name: kaiju_auth.services.PermissionService

methods.name: kaiju_auth.services.PermissionService.get_all_permissions
documentation:
Return all active permissions in alphabetic order.

```
param id



param group_by_tag

permissions will be grouped by a permission tag

param query

search by permission tag or description
```
Service which stores user permission keys and information about them.

documentation:
Initialize.

```
param app

web app

param database_service

db service instance or name

param permission_service

permissions service instance or name

param logger

logger instance
```

methods.name: kaiju_auth.services.GroupService.get_permissions
documentation:
Return group(s) permissions. Non-active permission keys will be ignored.

```
param id

group identifier

returns

a set of permissions
```

methods.name: kaiju_auth.services.GroupService.set_permissions
documentation:
Set permissions in the group.

All non-mentioned permissions will be removed.

```
param id

group identifier

param permissions

a list of permissions

returns

a new set of available permissions
```

methods.name: kaiju_auth.services.GroupService.modify_permissions
documentation:
Modify permissions in a group.

```python
await groups.modify_permissions('users', {'do.this': True, 'do.that': False})
```

```
param id

group identifier

param permissions

{ <permission key>: <bool> } mapping

returns

a new set of available permissions
```

documentation:
Initialize.

```
param key_path

private RSA key location to a pem file (by default the key is auto-generated)

param cache_service

cache service string or instance

param ttl

key lifetime in seconds

param algorithm

encryption algorithm

param key_size

encryption key size

param shared

public keys are shared between different apps
```
